critical_issues.title: Smoke test can pass on unhealthy deployment, allowing unsafe production swap
critical_issues.recommendation: Use an authenticated and deterministic smoke test and require strict success status before allowing swap.

suggestions.title: Add retry/backoff to smoke test to reduce flaky failures
suggestions.recommendation: Retry smoke test attempts with delay before failing.

suggestions.title: Workflow test is too string-based and may miss ordering/regression issues
suggestions.recommendation: Assert step ordering to ensure deploy -> smoke -> swap flow is preserved.
